data.name: Umbranomicon
data.detailed_description:
🔥DELUXE EDITION UMBRANOMICON ❤️‍🔥


關於此遊戲

臍帶血 不僅僅是一部視覺小說，它是一個擁有自己故事的完整而複雜的世界、日式角色扮演遊戲和動畫約會模擬器。你會發現自己置身於魔法世界盧明多王國，狡猾自戀的諾克斯女王施了詛咒，將所有人類變成了邪惡的矮人，王國瀕臨崩潰。

您的角色是被選中的英雄，受當地統治者 傘形 召喚，從即將到來的黑暗中拯救 盧明多 及其美麗的居民。你將踏上危險而又刺激的冒險，揭開秘密，贏得女孩們的芳心，每個女孩都有鮮明的個性和獨特的外表。

深入這個豐富的冒險世界：

探索風景如畫、神秘莫測的盧明多爾角落，使用基於反應和速度的動態戰鬥系統與敵人作戰。透過解開美麗女主角內心的秘密並進入火熱誘人的場景來賺取金幣、購買禮物並贏得她們的信任。

● 6 個可愛的女性角色：每個角色都有自己獨特的風格、氣質和個人故事。

●動畫 H場景：逼真、刺激，可隨時重複觀看。

● 原創戰鬥機制：以快速且刺激的方式與敵人戰鬥，考驗您的反應能力。

● 互動對話和約會系統：你的每一句話都會影響關係的發展並解鎖新的故事情節。

● 迷你遊戲和支線任務：增強您的遊戲體驗並獲得寶貴的獎勵。

● 全面而細緻的世界：分為不同區域，每個區域都有獨特的位置。

data.short_description: 臍帶血 是一種完全沉浸式的體驗！因為您可以同時獲得兩個功能：一個 VN 和一個全動畫約會模擬器。你將要深入一個充滿危險冒險的神秘世界，與黑暗女王戰鬥，並遇到許多孤獨的女孩，因為男人已經滅絕了。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (64-bit)
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Umbranomicon
data.detailed_description:
🔥DELUXE EDITION UMBRANOMICON ❤️‍🔥


About the Game

Umbranomicon is more than just a visual novel, it's an entire elaborate world with its own story, JRPG and animated dating simulator. You'll find yourself in the magical world of the kingdom of Lumindor, which was on the verge of collapse after the sly and narcissistic Queen Nox cast a curse, turning all men into evil dwarves.

Your role is as the chosen hero, summoned by the local ruler Umbra to save Lumindor and its beautiful inhabitants from the impending darkness. You will have to set out on dangerous and exciting adventures, uncover secrets and win the hearts of the girls, each of whom has a distinctive character and unique appearance.

Dive into this rich world of adventure:

Explore the picturesque and mysterious corners of Lumindor, fight enemies using a dynamic combat system that is based on reaction and speed. Earn gold, purchase gifts and gain trust of beautiful heroines by unlocking the secrets of their hearts and gaining access to hot and seductive scenes.

● 6 adorable female characters: each has her own unique style, temperament, and personal story.

● Animated H-scenes: realistic and exciting, available for repeat viewing at any time.

● Original combat mechanic: fight enemies in a fast and exciting mode that tests your reactions.

● Interactive dialog and dating system: every your words influence the development of relationships and unlock new storylines.

● Mini-games and side quests: enhance your playthrough and earn valuable rewards.

● Comprehensive and detailed world: divided into different regions with unique locations.

data.short_description: Umbranomicon is a full immersive experience! Because you get two in one: a VN and a fully animated dating simulator. You will have to dive into a mystical world of dangerous adventures to fight the Queen of Darkness and meet a lot of lonely girls, because men are extinct.
data.supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Turkish

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (64-bit)
  • Processor: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
